name: Driver: San Francisco
post_apply_message:
Driver San Francisco — CRACK + save-mirror build:
1. Intro Bink files (DriverSplash + ubisoft) renamed to .gfm-orig.
2. DXVK d3d9.dll dropped next to Driver.exe (SteamOS story-mode CTD fix).
3. SKIDROW crack files (Driver.exe + Uplay-emulator DLLs) copied over the game dir, originals backed up as .gfm-orig — this removes the Uplay/Ubisoft Connect requirement entirely (no launcher, no sign-in). Revert restores your stock Steam exe.
4. Launch wrapper runs Driver.exe directly (skips the Ubisoft launcher).
5. SAVE MIRROR (optional step): symlinks the crack's save folder 'SKIDROW' -> your real Uplay folder 'TPepperoni666', so the crack and the legit Steam build share ONE save. Needs the game to have run once (so Documents/Ubisoft/Driver San Francisco/TPepperoni666/ exists) — it already does from your Steam playthrough, so it links on apply.

ORDER: apply -> launch. If the save-mirror step reports skipped, your username folder name differs from 'TPepperoni666' — tell me and I'll adjust the target. If Steam still runs the Ubisoft launcher instead of the crack, make sure the dsf-launch.sh wrapper line is in the launch options.
notes: Delisted from Steam Dec 2016; Ubisoft Connect ONLINE SERVICES (challenges/MP) shut down Oct 2022. Tony owns it on Steam (appid 33440) but the mandatory Uplay/Ubisoft Connect DRM (compiled into the stock Driver.exe) blocks launch under Proton. CRACK ROUTE 2026-07-09 (Tony supplied a SKIDROW v1.04 crack for the game he owns; DRM-circumvention gray area but owned game + dead servers): overlay the SKIDROW crack files onto the Steam install so no Uplay is needed. Crack payload = Driver.exe + skidrow.dll + uplay_r1_loader.dll + ubiorbitapi_r2_loader.dll + ubiorbitapi_r2.dll, staged OFF-GIT at <local-payloads>/driver-san-francisco/payload/crack/ (NAS 'Game Fixes' share) — copyrighted, never committed. SAVE-FOLDER FINDING: legit Uplay build saves to Documents/Ubisoft/Driver San Francisco/<Ubisoft-username>/savegames/autosave.dat (his = 'TPepperoni666', 19.2KB); SKIDROW crack saves under a 'SKIDROW' folder. New 'symlink' step links SKIDROW -> TPepperoni666 (directory symlink, survives atomic saves) so both exes share one save. Legit fixes retained: intro skip (PCGW), DXVK d3d9.dll story-mode CTD fix (v3.0.1 pinned), launcher-bypass wrapper (waitforexitandrun swap). If the crack file set is incomplete, Revert restores stock and we widen the overlay.
